projects.name: acme-payments
projects.description: Payment gateway and billing reconciliation service.
projects.memory:
## Conventions
- All money handled in integer cents.
- Idempotency keys required on every charge endpoint.
- Staging deploys gated behind e2e suite.

skills.name: Deploy staging pipeline
skills.content:
# Deploy staging pipeline
Run the build, push the image, then `make deploy-staging` and wait for the health check to go green.

skills.name: Rotate API keys
skills.content:
# Rotate API keys
Generate a new key in the vault, roll it out to staging, verify, then revoke the old key after 24h.

projects.name: blog-engine
projects.description: Static blog generator with a markdown content pipeline.
projects.memory:
## Notes
- Posts live under content/posts.
- `npm run build` regenerates the static site.

skills.name: Run e2e before merge
skills.content:
# Run e2e before merge
Always run `npm run e2e` and confirm zero failures before merging to main.

projects.name: mobile-checkout
projects.description: Mobile checkout flow and cart persistence.
projects.memory:
## Notes
- Cart state persists in encrypted local storage.
- Checkout calls acme-payments for the final charge.
